defect: thermal growth offset ignored on hot service
prompt: Diagnose the most likely fault or failure mode and explain what evidence supports it.
scenario: You are on a heavy-industrial construction or process site where work follows engineered drawings, specifications, and permits. The work under review is Shaft alignment, part of the Equipment & Machinery scope. The observed field condition is: thermal growth offset ignored on hot service. The work is in service as an operating asset. Reference material on hand: API 686, laser system manuals.
title: Fault diagnosis: Shaft alignment (industrial site)
